name: ToolSnap MCP
description: Context-efficient microtools for AI agents. Flagship: fetch_extract converts raw HTML to clean text with a median 98.1% token reduction (53,820 → 2,001 tokens, 11 real pages) — saving ~$0.156/call at Sonnet pricing instead of loading the full page into context. 23 free utility tools included (UUID, hash, Base64, URL encode/decode, JSON/CSV/PDF query, HTML→Markdown, text diff, regex, webpage metadata, RSS/sitemap parse, token count, and more). Pay-per-call $0.02 USDC on Base via x402, first call free. Prepaid balance available: deposit once ($0.50 min), calls debit off-chain at $0.01 (50% off, no per-call gas).
